name: on-save-rule-file
description: Validate a rule catalog file immediately on save so authoring errors surface fast.

notify.title: Rule catalog lint failed
notify.message: Catalog file ${trigger.filePath} has lint errors. Fix before committing or downstream verification will be inconsistent.

notes: Excludes files starting with _ via the lint command's own filter.
Cross-file ID uniqueness is checked even when linting a single file,
since the loader reads sibling files for the check.
